inputs.prompt: Programme: 'The Midnight Line' — a 10-part late-night radio series following the stories of people who work through the night: nurses, bakers, security guards, DJs, freight drivers. Format: 10 x 30 min. Each episode profiles one person, recorded on location during their actual shift. Target station: BBC Radio 4. Audience: 35+, documentary listeners, people who are themselves awake late at night. Production company: Nightjar Audio, 5 years experience, previous Radio 4 commission.
Programme: Interview show about entrepreneurship. 30 min weekly. Target: Local commercial radio station.

Programme: 'Continental Drift' — a 6-part radio series exploring how six European cities are adapting to climate change, told through the voices of the people implementing the changes. Format: 6 x 45 min. Target: NPO Radio 1 (Netherlands). Audience: General listeners interested in European affairs and environment. Production company: Klankwerk Producties (Amsterdam), previous commissions from VPRO and NPO Radio Doc. Co-production interest: ORF (Austria) and DR (Denmark) have expressed preliminary interest.
